summary: Re-verified ФОРМАТ landing after MongoDB removal + npm migration refactor. Backend has no DB deps (grep confirmed no motor/pymongo/mongo imports). All 6 pytest backend tests pass; all 9 frontend Playwright checks pass (1 was a false-negative in my textContent check because badge uppercase comes from CSS). Lead form -> SMTP live, POST /api/leads returns email_sent=true for both minimal and calculator payloads.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is clean and MongoDB-free (no motor/pymongo imports, no DB models, requirements.txt has zero DB deps).
SMTP helper degrades gracefully: if SMTP_* env vars are missing it returns (False, 'SMTP not configured (no-email mode)') and the lead is still logged with '=== НОВАЯ ЗАЯВКА ===' — good fallback.
POST /api/leads always returns 200; email_error is surfaced in the response body so the frontend can distinguish sent vs not-sent (though currently frontend ignores it — acceptable for landing).
App.js is 1736 lines — beyond the 700-line guideline. Consider splitting into feature components (Hero, Portfolio+Modal, Calculator, LeadForm, Founder, Visit) in a future refactor. Not blocking.

Success message text is split across an

('Спасибо!') and

('Мы свяжемся с вами в ближайшее время.') inside data-testid='lead-form-success-message'. Both texts are correctly rendered — the container-level text check confirms full success copy.
Portfolio modal carousel works: next/prev updates image src + counter (1/15 -> 2/15 -> back to 1/15 -> thumb-2 -> 3/15). Touch/keyboard bindings present in code.
test_credentials: No auth. SMTP configured in backend/.env (smtp.yandex.ru:465, lax-jakal@yandex.ru).
seed_data_creation: Only in-memory test payloads prefixed with 'TEST_'. No DB writes possible (MongoDB removed). Real emails were sent to lax-jakal@yandex.ru by the SMTP tests (email_sent=true confirmed).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Refactor verified end-to-end: (1) backend has zero DB code, requirements.txt only has fastapi, starlette, pydantic, uvicorn, python-dotenv, aiosmtplib; (2) /api/ health returns 200 with 'ФОРМАТ API Active'; (3) /api/leads returns 200 with email_sent=true for both minimal and calculator payloads (via SMTP); (4) Frontend hero, SVO badge, floating buttons, founder photo, portfolio lightbox with carousel + thumbnails, visit-cta prefill, and full lead-form submit->success flow all working with data-testid selectors. Public URL: https://capella-builds.preview.emergentagent.com.
rca of the issue: No bugs found. Note for future testing: the hero SVO badge renders 'Скидки молодым семьям' with textContent (uppercase is CSS-only via `uppercase` Tailwind class). If asserting badge copy, use case-insensitive contains or check computed text-transform, not raw textContent.
